历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2025, the minimum ranking for this category is approximately 4805 (first-choice physics with chemistry subject group), currently the only one; the university's enrollment plan for physics category in Fujian Province is 20 students in 2025, significantly increasing to 25 students in 2026, an expansion of 25%, with a notable expansion rate, which has a significant downward effect on rankings (ranking number increases).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Normal University (Zhuhai Campus) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking approximately 19th (Top20) on the Soft Science main ranking, with an extremely high school level, which also has a strong attraction for physics category candidates; in 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (overall ranking 37th), short video exposure is medium-high, reflecting relatively high attention for applications; Beijing Normal University has disciplines such as Education A+, Psychology A+, Mathematics A, Physics A-, Systems Science A-, Statistics A, etc. The mathematics category (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, etc.) offered by the Zhuhai Campus for physics category is highly related to Mathematics A and Physics A-, and the Science Experimental Class (including Geography A+, Psychology A+, Biological Science, Chemistry A-) covers multiple A-level disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Mathematics/Statistics majors have a social popularity of recommended to slightly hot, Computer/Software/Artificial Intelligence majors are recommended, and Teacher Education majors are divided and wait-and-see; in 2026, the total number of college entrance exam candidates in Fujian Province is approximately 267,900, an increase of about 6.2% compared to 2025, and estimated physics category candidates are about 203,940 based on recent proportions, an increase of about 6.2% compared to 2025 (192,096), intensifying competition; provincial control line data for 2026 has not yet been released and is not included in the judgment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 4805, the significant expansion of 25% in 2026 (direction of significant increase in ranking number) and the total number of candidates in Fujian Province increasing by about 6.2% (direction of intensified competition), the expansion effect is clearly dominant, but the school's 985 level and popular majors (mathematics category, artificial intelligence direction) still maintain strong attraction. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 5576, with a range of 5076-6076.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Mathematics Category (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, Systems Science and Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence (Innovation Experimental Class), Applied Statistics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Social Science Experimental Class (including Economics (Data Science Direction), Financial Technology)
- Management Science (Qian Xuesen Intelligent Management Excellence Talent Experimental Class)
- Education (Beijing Normal University Education, Beijing Institute of Technology AI Joint Degree Training Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (including Geography, Psychology, Biological Science, Chemistry).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the predicted range (5076) can focus on sprinting for Mathematics Category (including Artificial Intelligence direction); candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (approximately 5300-5800) are recommended to mainly consider Social Science Experimental Class, Management Science, and Education Joint Training Program; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (6076) should use Science Experimental Class as a safety option.
